title: Mid-Level Radiologist at GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
